notes: Use Notion MCP as the primary saved-view path for phase 3 intelligence databases.
Keep direct REST as the canonical path for schema, rows, markdown content, validation, and logs.
Only use Playwright if Notion MCP cannot complete the saved-view task.

views.name: Recommended Resume
views.purpose: Show the strongest resume candidates with their current confidence.
views.configure: FILTER "Recommendation Lane" = "Resume"; SORT BY "Recommendation Score" DESC; SHOW "Name", "Recommendation Lane", "Recommendation Score", "Recommendation Confidence", "Recommendation Updated", "Next Move"

views.name: Recommended Finish
views.configure: FILTER "Recommendation Lane" = "Finish"; SORT BY "Recommendation Score" DESC; SHOW "Name", "Recommendation Lane", "Recommendation Score", "Recommendation Confidence", "Ship Readiness", "Effort to Ship"

views.name: Investigate Now
views.configure: FILTER "Recommendation Lane" = "Investigate"; SORT BY "Recommendation Score" DESC; SHOW "Name", "Recommendation Lane", "Recommendation Score", "Recommendation Confidence", "Current State", "Biggest Blocker"

views.name: Defer Candidates
views.purpose: Show projects that look like hold, archive, or merge candidates.
views.configure: FILTER "Recommendation Lane" = "Defer"; SORT BY "Recommendation Score" DESC; SHOW "Name", "Recommendation Lane", "Recommendation Score", "Momentum", "Evidence Freshness", "Setup Friction"

views.name: Support Gaps
views.purpose: Highlight projects where recommendation confidence is low because support is thin.
views.configure: FILTER "Recommendation Confidence" = "Low"; SORT BY "Recommendation Updated" DESC; SHOW "Name", "Recommendation Lane", "Recommendation Confidence", "Related Research Count", "Supporting Skills Count", "Linked Tool Count"

views.name: Latest Weekly
views.purpose: Keep the canonical weekly recommendation runs front and center.
views.configure: FILTER "Run Type" = "Weekly Portfolio"; SORT BY "Run Date" DESC; SHOW "Name", "Status", "Run Date", "Top Resume Project", "Top Finish Project", "Top Investigate Project", "Top Defer Project"

views.name: Daily Focus
views.purpose: Show the lighter daily-focus runs derived from the weekly steering state.
views.configure: FILTER "Run Type" = "Daily Focus"; SORT BY "Run Date" DESC; SHOW "Name", "Status", "Run Date", "Top Resume Project", "Summary"

views.name: History
views.configure: SORT BY "Run Date" DESC; SHOW "Name", "Run Type", "Status", "Run Date", "Model Version", "Reviewer", "Reviewed On"

views.name: Review Queue
views.purpose: Keep proposed link suggestions in a single queue for review.
views.configure: FILTER "Status" = "Proposed"; SORT BY "Confidence Score" DESC; SHOW "Name", "Suggestion Type", "Local Project", "Confidence Score", "Suggested In Run"

views.name: Accepted
views.purpose: Review the suggestions that improved live relations.
views.configure: FILTER "Status" = "Accepted"; SORT BY "Confidence Score" DESC; SHOW "Name", "Suggestion Type", "Local Project", "Confidence Score", "Review Notes"

views.name: Rejected
views.purpose: Keep rejection memory visible so suggestions do not resurface blindly.
views.configure: FILTER "Status" = "Rejected"; SORT BY "Confidence Score" DESC; SHOW "Name", "Suggestion Type", "Local Project", "Confidence Score", "Review Notes"

views.name: By Project
views.purpose: Review suggestion history in project context.
views.configure: SORT BY "Confidence Score" DESC; SHOW "Name", "Local Project", "Suggestion Type", "Status", "Confidence Score", "Suggested In Run"
